stemHtml: Before departure, the flight crew received no indication of thunderstorm activity near LIPM in the official weather briefing, and the METAR indicated CAVOK conditions. Despite this, the captain’s personal lightning-detection app displayed intense thunderstorm activity in the vicinity of the airport. What is the most appropriate course of action?

options.b: Proceed as planned and assess the situation closer to the airport using the same app.
options.c: Proceed as planned, as the app is not an official source of information.
